# AZ Water Check

> Authorized Aquafeel Solutions dealer providing free in-home water quality testing and dual-tank water purification systems across the Phoenix metropolitan area, Tucson, and statewide Arizona. Bilingual service in English and Spanish.

## About

AZ Water Check is a residential water filtration company based in Chandler, Arizona, owned and operated by Solit Zitnik, a water treatment specialist with over 15 years of experience. The company is the only authorized dealer in Arizona of the Aquafeel Solutions dual-tank water purification system, an NSF-certified whole-home water treatment solution specifically designed for Arizona's extreme hard water conditions.

- **Owner:** Solit Zitnik, Water Quality Specialist (15+ years experience)
- **Address:** 1916 N Pennington Dr, Chandler, AZ 85224
- **Phone:** (602) 603-4006
- **Email:** info@azwatercheck.com
- **Hours:** Monday-Saturday, 8 AM - 6 PM MST
- **Languages:** English, Spanish (bilingual service)
- **Parent Company:** Sol Deja Vu LLC
- **Certifications:** Water Quality Association member, NSF ANSI 44/42/61/372, BBB Accredited, Made in USA

## Service Area

AZ Water Check serves the entire state of Arizona with primary focus on the Phoenix metropolitan area:

- Phoenix
- Mesa
- Chandler (headquarters)
- Gilbert
- Tempe
- Scottsdale
- Glendale
- Peoria
- Tucson
- Surprise
- Goodyear
- Avondale
- Buckeye
- Cave Creek
- Fountain Hills
- Queen Creek

## Services Offered

### Free In-Home Water Quality Test

A complimentary 15-minute on-site water analysis performed by a certified specialist. Tests for chlorine, total dissolved solids (TDS), water hardness (grains per gallon), heavy metals, and common contaminants. The customer sees results in real time. No obligation, no cost.

- **Price:** $0 (Free)
- **Duration:** 15 minutes
- **Location:** Customer's home
- **Booking:** https://azwatercheck.com/free-water-test/ or call (602) 603-4006

### Aquafeel Dual-Tank Water Purification System

The flagship product. A whole-home water purification system featuring four filtration stages:

1. **Pre-Filter** — Removes sediment, rust, and large particles
2. **KDF Media** — Reduces chlorine, heavy metals, and bacteria via electrochemical oxidation
3. **Catalytic Carbon** — Removes chemicals, pesticides, and organic compounds
4. **Ion Exchange Resin** — Softens water by removing calcium and magnesium

**System specifications:**
- **Warranty:** Lifetime (only system in Arizona offering this)
- **Maintenance cycle:** One service visit every 10 years (vs. competitor 7-year replacement)
- **Certifications:** NSF/ANSI 44, NSF/ANSI 42, NSF/ANSI 61/372
- **Country of origin:** Made in USA
- **Track record:** 15+ years of installations
- **Coverage:** Whole-home (every tap, every appliance)

## Key Facts About Arizona Water

- The Phoenix metropolitan area has water hardness averaging **15-25 grains per gallon (GPG)**, far exceeding the Water Quality Association's "very hard" threshold of 7+ GPG.
- Phoenix tap water sources include Salt River Project (SRP), Central Arizona Project (CAP), and groundwater wells.
- Arizona water typically contains chlorine, chloramine, fluoride, and trace heavy metals from aging infrastructure.
- Common signs of hard water in Arizona homes: chalky white residue on faucets, dry skin and hair after showering, soap that won't lather, scale buildup in water heaters, spotted dishes, stiff laundry, higher energy bills.
- Single-tank water filtration systems struggle with Arizona's combination of extreme hardness plus chemical treatment. Dual-tank systems address both simultaneously.

## Why AZ Water Check is Different

- **Only dual-tank specialist in Arizona** — competitors use single-tank systems with shorter lifespans
- **Lifetime warranty** — competitors offer 7-10 year warranties
- **10-year maintenance cycle** — competitors require full system replacement every 7 years at $6,000-$10,000
- **Bilingual service** — fluent English and Spanish for the Arizona Hispanic market
- **Curiosity-first sales approach** — Solit asks questions and shows water test results, never high-pressure
- **Personal service** — owner-operated, not a franchise or large corporate sales operation
